name: mariomarcolongo
description: AI evaluation, scientific evidence and research operations portfolio with role-specific CVs and evidence-bound public records

scripts.dev: node scripts/check-stale-strings.js && node scripts/generate-llm-dossiers.js && astro dev
scripts.build: npm run lint && node scripts/generate-llm-dossiers.js && astro build && node scripts/postbuild.js && node scripts/verify-dist.js
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run verify:render && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=mariomarcolongo
scripts.pdf: npm run pdf:resume && npm run pdf:cv

author: Mario Marcolongo <me@mariomarcolongo.com>
